Title: Escalations had no raise flow
Current Behaviour (before): Program Admin could view/resolve escalations, but the list was hardcoded seed inside the page and no HOD/Lecturer screen could create one.
Fix: Moved escalations into the store (addEscalation/resolveEscalation); added /hod/escalations and /lecturer/escalations raise+track pages via shared EscalationsPanel; PA page reads the store; both parties + PA notified.

Title: Institution/program announcements were write-only
Current Behaviour (before): Super Admin/Program Admin/HOD could post announcements targeting all or a programme, but students and lecturers had no feed to read them (only module-scoped ones showed).
Fix: Added shared /announcements read feed filtered by audience (all / my programme / my modules); added nav entry for students and lecturers.

Title: Lecturer-to-student messages had no student inbox
Current Behaviour (before): Lecturer could message students, but the thread was local to the lecturer screen and students had no Messages view to read or reply.
Fix: Persisted messages in the store (DirectMessage/sendMessage); rewrote lecturer page to use the store; added /cohort-student/messages inbox with two-way reply; recipient notified.

Title: Enrolling a student did not update the intake roster
Current Behaviour (before): Creating a student from an application set the student's intakeId but did not push them into intake.enrolledStudentIds, so intake counts/reports were stale.
Fix: On enrol, append the new student id to the selected intake's enrolledStudentIds via updateIntake.

Title: Module creation was hard to find
Current Behaviour (before): Modules are created inside Programs -> a programme -> semester, but the Modules nav pages are view/oversight-only, so reviewers could not find where modules are created.
Fix: Added a hint/link on both the HOD and Program Admin Modules pages explaining modules are created within a programme.

Title: CA marks not derived from graded work
Current Behaviour (before): Lecturers grade assignments/quizzes individually, but moduleGrade CA marks are seed values and Submit CA is only a flag, so reviewers may wonder where CA totals come from.
Fix: Documented as an accepted prototype simplification (not changed).

Title: Attendance / timetable / profile / fee ledger
Current Behaviour (before): Present only in the throwaway /test scaffold, not the real SRS app.
